---
title: "The Hon. Caroline Mary Vernon Harcourt"
---

## The Hon. Caroline Mary Vernon Harcourt

**Dates:** (d. 16 July 1871)

**Maiden name:** (Peachey)

### Description

godmother of CMY

### Biography

She married (19 Aug 1814) the Rev. Leveson Vernon Harcourt.  Her will was proved (<i>c</i>. £45,000) by her adopted daughter the Hon. Caroline Mary Frances Jervis, of West Hay, Somerset and the Hon. William Monk Jervis. [PB; wills index]

### Letters

- Letter from July 25th [1864]
- Letter from July 27th [1863]
- Letter from 20 October [1850]
- Letter from [1839]
- Letter from August 6, 1838

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
